title: 「Hardly / Rarely / Barely」句型

source.file: Sentence Structure 94 -「Hardly _ Rarely _ Barely」近乎否定句.pdf

formula: Subject + auxiliary/modal + hardly + base verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: Hardly 配合助動詞或情態動詞
formulas.labelEn: Hardly with an auxiliary or modal
formulas.formula: Subject + auxiliary/modal + hardly + base verb + other information
Subject + hardly + main verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: Hardly any / enough 配合名詞
formulas.labelEn: Hardly any / enough with a noun
formulas.formula: Subject + verb / be + hardly any / hardly enough + noun + other information
Rarely + do/does/did + subject + base verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: Rarely 配合 be、情態動詞或 have
formulas.labelEn: Rarely with be, a modal or have

formulas.formula: Subject + barely + main verb + other information

example: We had hardly enough time to revise the report.
exampleZh: 我們幾乎沒有足夠時間修改報告。

examples.en: We had hardly enough time to revise the report.
examples.zh: 我們幾乎沒有足夠時間修改報告。

examples.en: Rarely do simple answers solve complex problems.
examples.zh: 複雜問題很少能靠簡單答案解決。

examples.en: The team barely met the deadline.
examples.zh: 團隊勉強趕上了截止日期。

meaning.zh: Hardly 表示幾乎不／幾乎沒有；rarely 表示很少／不常；barely 表示僅僅／勉強。

rules.zh: 使用 hardly 表示某物幾乎不存在，或某個動作幾乎無法做到。
rules.en: Use hardly for near absence or near inability.

rules.zh: 使用 rarely 表示低頻率；本練習中的 rarely 必須放在句首。
rules.en: Use rarely for low frequency; in this exercise, put it at the beginning of the sentence.

rules.zh: 當 Rarely 放在句首時，要使用倒裝語序。
rules.en: A sentence beginning with Rarely requires inversion.

rules.zh: 在 do、does 或 did 之後，必須使用原形動詞。
rules.en: After do, does or did, use the base verb.

rules.zh: 使用 barely 表示事情只是僅僅成功或勉強做到。
rules.en: Use barely when something succeeds by only a very small margin.

rules.zh: Hardly、rarely 和 barely 已帶有否定意思，一般不要再加入 not、never 或 no。
rules.en: Do not add another negative word because hardly, rarely and barely already carry a negative meaning.

rules.zh: Hardly 和 barely 有時可以互換；本練習以 hardly 表示幾乎沒有／不能，以 barely 表示僅僅成功／勉強足夠。
rules.en: Hardly and barely sometimes overlap; this exercise uses hardly for near absence or inability and barely for narrow success.

rules.zh: Hard 表示努力地／猛烈地；hardly 表示幾乎不。
rules.en: Hard and hardly have different meanings.

benefits.zh: 準確分辨「幾乎沒有」、「很少發生」和「僅僅做到」。
benefits.en: It helps you express an exact degree.

benefits.zh: 用一個簡短副詞代替較長解釋。
Hardly 和 rarely 表示近乎沒有或非常罕見，而不需要作出絕對聲稱。
benefits.en: It helps you avoid absolute statements.

benefits.zh: 以 Rarely 開始句子能突出罕見程度，並增加句式變化。
benefits.en: Rarely gives you a powerful sentence opening.

benefits.zh: 這些詞適合用於日常說話、作文、報告和討論，描述結果、頻率、證據、能力和勉強成功。
benefits.en: These words are useful in speaking, essays, reports and discussions.

en: Rewrite each sentence using the most suitable target word: hardly, rarely or barely.
Use hardly for “almost no/almost not”, rarely for “not often”, and barely for “only just/by a very small margin”.
Begin every rarely answer with Rarely and use inversion.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用最合適的目標詞 hardly、rarely 或 barely 改寫以下句子。
Hardly 表示「幾乎沒有／幾乎不能」；rarely 表示「很少發生」；barely 表示「僅僅做到／勉強成功」。
所有使用 rarely 的答案都必須以 Rarely 開始，並使用倒裝語序。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We had very little time to revise the report.
questions.promptZh: 我們只有很少時間修改報告。
questions.answer: We had hardly any time to revise the report.
questions.answerZh: 我們幾乎沒有時間修改報告。
questions.highlight: We had hardly any time to revise the report.

questions.prompt: Simple answers do not often solve complex problems.
questions.promptZh: 簡單答案很少能解決複雜問題。
questions.answer: Rarely do simple answers solve complex problems.
questions.answerZh: 複雜問題很少能靠簡單答案解決。
questions.highlight: Rarely do simple answers solve complex problems.

questions.prompt: The team met the deadline by only a few minutes.
questions.promptZh: 團隊只以數分鐘之差趕上截止日期。
questions.answer: The team barely met the deadline.
questions.answerZh: 團隊勉強趕上了截止日期。
questions.highlight: The team barely met the deadline.

questions.prompt: Only a very small amount of food was left after the event.
questions.promptZh: 活動結束後只剩下很少食物。
questions.answer: There was hardly any food left after the event.
questions.answerZh: 活動結束後幾乎沒有食物剩下。
questions.highlight: There was hardly any food left after the event.

questions.prompt: I do not often eat after 10 p.m.
questions.promptZh: 我很少在晚上十時後進食。
questions.answer: Rarely do I eat after 10 p.m.
questions.answerZh: 我很少在晚上十時後進食。
questions.highlight: Rarely do I eat after 10 p.m.

questions.prompt: Mia passed the test by only one mark.
questions.promptZh: 米婭只高出合格分數一分，僅僅合格。
questions.answer: Mia barely passed the test.
questions.answerZh: 米婭勉強通過了測驗。
questions.highlight: Mia barely passed the test.

questions.prompt: The final instruction was so unclear that I found it almost impossible to understand.
questions.promptZh: 最後一項指示非常不清楚，我幾乎無法明白。
questions.answer: I could hardly understand the final instruction.
questions.answerZh: 我幾乎無法明白最後一項指示。
questions.highlight: I could hardly understand the final instruction.

questions.prompt: The library is not often this quiet on a Saturday.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館在星期六很少會這麼安靜。
questions.answer: Rarely is the library this quiet on a Saturday.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館在星期六很少會這麼安靜。
questions.highlight: Rarely is the library this quiet on a Saturday.

questions.prompt: The cyclist only just avoided hitting the open car door.
questions.promptZh: 那名單車手只是勉強避過撞上打開的車門。
questions.answer: The cyclist barely avoided hitting the open car door.
questions.answerZh: 那名單車手勉強避過撞上打開的車門。
questions.highlight: The cyclist barely avoided hitting the open car door.

questions.prompt: The room received very little natural light during winter.
questions.promptZh: 這個房間在冬天只得到很少天然光。
questions.answer: The room received hardly any natural light during winter.
questions.answerZh: 這個房間在冬天幾乎沒有天然光。
questions.highlight: The room received hardly any natural light during winter.

questions.prompt: Our teacher does not often cancel a lesson.
questions.promptZh: 我們的老師很少取消課堂。
questions.answer: Rarely does our teacher cancel a lesson.
questions.answerZh: 我們的老師很少取消課堂。
questions.highlight: Rarely does our teacher cancel a lesson.

questions.prompt: We got through the gate only a moment before it closed.
questions.promptZh: 我們只在閘門關閉前一刻通過。
questions.answer: We barely got through the gate before it closed.
questions.answerZh: 我們勉強在閘門關閉前通過。
questions.highlight: We barely got through the gate before it closed.

questions.prompt: Priya had very little energy left after the long walk.
questions.promptZh: 普莉雅走了很長的路後，只剩下很少力氣。
questions.answer: Priya had hardly any energy left after the long walk.
questions.answerZh: 普莉雅走了很長的路後，幾乎沒有力氣剩下。
questions.highlight: Priya had hardly any energy left after the long walk.

questions.prompt: We saw snow in our town only once every few years.
questions.promptZh: 我們鎮上每隔幾年才會看到一次雪。
questions.answer: Rarely did we see snow in our town.
questions.answerZh: 我們過去很少在鎮上看到雪。
questions.highlight: Rarely did we see snow in our town.

questions.prompt: Aaron had just enough money to pay the bus fare.
questions.promptZh: 艾倫的錢只夠支付巴士車資。
questions.answer: Aaron barely had enough money to pay the bus fare.
questions.answerZh: 艾倫勉強有足夠金錢支付巴士車資。
questions.highlight: Aaron barely had enough money to pay the bus fare.

questions.prompt: Very little evidence was available to support the claim.
questions.promptZh: 只有很少證據可以支持這項說法。
questions.answer: There was hardly any evidence to support the claim.
questions.answerZh: 幾乎沒有證據支持這項說法。
questions.highlight: There was hardly any evidence to support the claim.

questions.prompt: She almost never complains about extra work.
questions.promptZh: 她幾乎從不抱怨額外工作。
questions.answer: Rarely does she complain about extra work.
questions.answerZh: 她很少抱怨額外工作。
questions.highlight: Rarely does she complain about extra work.

questions.prompt: The candle gave only enough light for us to see the door.
questions.promptZh: 蠟燭發出的光只夠讓我們看見門口。
questions.answer: The candle gave barely enough light for us to see the door.
questions.answerZh: 蠟燭發出的光勉強足夠讓我們看見門口。
questions.highlight: The candle gave barely enough light for us to see the door.

questions.prompt: The child was so tired that keeping his eyes open was almost impossible.
questions.promptZh: 那個孩子太累了，幾乎無法張開眼睛。
questions.answer: The child could hardly keep his eyes open.
questions.answerZh: 那個孩子幾乎無法張開眼睛。
questions.highlight: The child could hardly keep his eyes open.

questions.prompt: People can predict how a new trend will develop only in unusual cases.
questions.promptZh: 人們只有在極少數情況下才能預測新趨勢會如何發展。
questions.answer: Rarely can people predict how a new trend will develop.
questions.answerZh: 人們很少能預測新趨勢會如何發展。
questions.highlight: Rarely can people predict how a new trend will develop.

questions.prompt: The goalkeeper caught the ball with only the tips of his fingers.
questions.promptZh: 守門員只用手指尖勉強接住了球。
questions.answer: The goalkeeper barely caught the ball with the tips of his fingers.
questions.answerZh: 守門員用手指尖勉強接住了球。
questions.highlight: The goalkeeper barely caught the ball with the tips of his fingers.

questions.prompt: We had very little chance to discuss the issue before the meeting ended.
questions.promptZh: 會議結束前，我們只有很少機會討論這個問題。
questions.answer: We had hardly any chance to discuss the issue before the meeting ended.
questions.answerZh: 會議結束前，我們幾乎沒有機會討論這個問題。
questions.highlight: We had hardly any chance to discuss the issue before the meeting ended.

questions.prompt: The museum has displayed all three paintings together on very few occasions.
questions.promptZh: 博物館只曾在極少數場合同時展出這三幅畫。
questions.answer: Rarely has the museum displayed all three paintings together.
questions.answerZh: 博物館很少同時展出這三幅畫。
questions.highlight: Rarely has the museum displayed all three paintings together.

questions.prompt: The battery only just lasted until the end of the call.
questions.promptZh: 電池只是勉強維持到通話結束。
questions.answer: The battery barely lasted until the end of the call.
questions.answerZh: 電池勉強維持到通話結束。
questions.highlight: The battery barely lasted until the end of the call.

questions.prompt: The old phone had very little storage space left.
questions.promptZh: 那部舊手機只剩下很少儲存空間。
questions.answer: The old phone had hardly any storage space left.
questions.answerZh: 那部舊手機幾乎沒有儲存空間剩下。

questions.prompt: During his six years at the company, he was late only twice.
questions.promptZh: 他在公司工作的六年間只遲到過兩次。
questions.answer: Rarely was he late during his six years at the company.
questions.answerZh: 他在公司工作的六年間很少遲到。
questions.highlight: Rarely was he late during his six years at the company.

questions.prompt: Sofia escaped injury by a very narrow margin when the shelf fell.
questions.promptZh: 架子倒下時，蘇菲亞只是非常勉強地避過受傷。
questions.answer: Sofia barely escaped injury when the shelf fell.
questions.answerZh: 架子倒下時，蘇菲亞勉強避過受傷。
questions.highlight: Sofia barely escaped injury when the shelf fell.

questions.prompt: We were sitting so far from the speaker that hearing her was almost impossible.
questions.promptZh: 我們坐得離講者太遠，幾乎聽不到她說話。
questions.answer: We could hardly hear the speaker from where we were sitting.

questions.highlight: We could hardly hear the speaker from where we were sitting.

questions.prompt: We do not often receive such detailed feedback.
questions.promptZh: 我們很少收到這麼詳細的意見。
questions.answer: Rarely do we receive such detailed feedback.
questions.answerZh: 我們很少收到這麼詳細的意見。

questions.prompt: The town had almost no public transport after 10 p.m.

questions.answer: Rarely does the system fail.

questions.prompt: Before that meeting, the twins had almost never disagreed so strongly.

questions.answer: Rarely had the twins disagreed so strongly before that meeting.

questions.promptZh: 小型企業只有在極少數情況下，才能在沒有援助下捱過如此長時間的停業。

questions.answer: Rarely have organisations faced several major disruptions in the same week.
questions.answerZh: 機構很少在同一星期面對數項重大干擾。
